page: Amazon Web Services m8gd.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the AWS Graviton processor family. It features 48 dedicated physical cores based on the ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 architecture running at 2.8 GHz, with no hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, it includes 2850 GB of NVMe SSD instance store capacity. Network performance is supported by a 22 Gbps baseline bandwidth managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core and memory subsystem performance. The m8gd.12xlarge achieves top-tier results in Geekbench multi-core execution, software compilation with Clang, and Passmark memory and database operations. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, scoring in the top tier for both large-block read-only and write operations. Additionally, static web serving throughput is in the top tier, while multi-core CPU stress tests and Redis SET operations rank in the top 25 percent.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ARMv9 architecture combined with high-density local NVMe storage offers a resource-dense profile for workloads requiring high I/O performance without the overhead of external storage attachments. The instance is well-suited for database operations, software compilation pipelines, static web serving, and memory-intensive multi-threaded applications.
description: Amazon Web Services m8gd.12xlarge is an ARM64 general-purpose instance powered by 48 dedicated physical cores of the AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 processor running at 2.8 GHz. It features 192.0 GB of RAM and 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage, operating on the Nitro hypervisor with a 22 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark results place this instance in the top tier for multi-core Geekbench performance, software compilation, database operations, and large-block memory bandwidth. It also demonstrates strong performance in multi-core stress tests and Redis operations. Given its balanced CPU-to-memory ratio and high-speed local storage, the m8gd.12xlarge is highly suited for database hosting, multi-threaded software compilation, high-throughput web serving, and general-purpose enterprise workloads requiring local NVMe performance.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8gd.12xlarge is an ARM64 instance with 48 Graviton Neoverse-V2 cores, 192 GB RAM, and 2850 GB NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier database and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services m8gd.12xlarge is an ARM64 instance featuring 48 Graviton cores, 192 GB RAM, and 2850 GB local NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: An ARM64 general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Graviton cores, high-speed local NVMe storage, and top-tier memory bandwidth for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 48 dedicated AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 physical cores at 2.8 GHz
Includes 192.0 GB of system memory and 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier benchmark performance in database operations and software compilation
Delivers high-speed memory bandwidth exceeding 400 GB/sec for large-block reads
Equipped with 22 Gbps baseline network bandwidth via the Nitro hypervisor
Optimized for database hosting, web serving, and multi-threaded enterprise applications
